transcript: Speaker A: If you can understand this video, your English is at an A2 level. Speaker B: Sorry, my English is not good. Speaker A: You should practice everyday. Speaker B: But I don't have anyone to practice with. Speaker A: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. Speaker B: I can speak with you? Speaker A: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. Speaker B: But I make a lot of mistakes. Speaker A: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Speaker B: Sounds good! Speaker A: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
on_screen_text: If you can understand this video your English is at an A2 level. Sorry, my English is not good. You should practice everyday. But I don't have anyone to practice with. That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. I can speak with you? Yes, I'll chat with you give you instant feedback on your pronunciation and help you get better with every conversation. But I make a lot of mistakes. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Sounds good! Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves. Loora
summary: An AI avatar named Loora converses with a human learner who lacks practice partners. Loora offers instant pronunciation feedback and supportive guidance to help the user improve. The ad promotes daily practice using the Loora app.
